title: elatine rubella
intro: Elatine rubella, also known as red water-crowfoot, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Elatinaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Elatine rubella include its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and infections, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Elatine rubella can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or topical cream, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies to treat a range of health conditions.
